name: Murgh Haryali (Cilantro-chicken Kebabs)
recipeIngredient: 3 chicken breasts, skinned and boned (net weight after boning 2 1/2 lbs)
1 cube fresh ginger, peeled and finely grated (1 inch)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut each chicken breast in half lengthwise, then cut each half crosswise into three or four equal pieces. Place on a platter.
2. Sprinkle salt and lemon juice over the pieces, then rub to coat. Let stand for 20 minutes.
3. In a bowl, beat yogurt smooth with fork/whisk. Add ginger, garlic, cumin, garam masala, and besan. Stir well.
4. Process green chilies and cilantro in food processor until paste forms. Mix paste into yogurt mixture.
5. Refrigerate chicken pieces for 6-24 hours, covered airtight.
6. Preheat oven to highest temperature (broiler is ideal).
7. Thread chicken onto skewers. Brush with half the melted butter, place on baking tray and bake 7 minutes.
8. Turn each piece over, brush remaining butter, then bake another 8-10 minutes.
9. Serve with onions sliced thickly and cucumbers.
